title: Duel on Yavin 4
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Yavin 4}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Duel |prev=[[Battle of Axion]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |conc=*[[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]]{{CW|10}} *[[Battle of Dantooine (Clone Wars)|Battle of Dantooine]] *[[Ambush on Ilum]] *[[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|Battle of Mon Calamari]] *[[Battle of Hypori/Legends|Battle of Hypori]]{{CW|20}} *[[Battle of Atraken]] |next=*[[Battle of Brentaal IV (Clone Wars)|Battle of Brentaal IV]] *[[Battle of Esseles (Clone Wars)|Battle of Esseles]] |image=[[File:Anakin_vs_asajj.jpg]] |name=Duel on Yavin 4 |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|21.66 BBY]], 4 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] |place=[[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]{{CW|17}} |result=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] victory *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] passes the [[Jedi Trials/Legends#Trial of Skill|Trial of Skill]]{{CW|21}} |side1=*Galactic Republic *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |side2=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |side3= |side4= |forces1=*1 [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] **[[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] Anakin Skywalker *''[[Azure Angel]]''† **[[R4-P22]]† *[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] **1 [[Unidentified Clone Sergeant (Yavin 4)|clone sergeant]] *1 [[CR20 troop carrier/Legends|CR-20 troop carrier]] |forces2=*1 [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] **[[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] *[[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|''Ginivex''-class starfighter]]{{CW|19}} |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*All [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] *''Azure Angel'' **R4-P22 *The CR20 |casual2=*Ventress seriously wounded *Ginivex starfighter captured |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I'm going to make you pay for what you've done.''"
"''Come, Padawan. Your fall will be my ascension to the Sith.|Anakin Skywalker and Asajj Ventress|audio=ImGoingToMakeYouPay.flac|}} This '''Duel''' on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] was a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber battle]] between [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] that took place in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] on the jungle [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Ventress had been dispatched by her [[Sith Master/Legends|Master]], the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] Count [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], to prove herself by assassinating Skywalker, who was at the time leading his [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|clone forces]] during the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]]. Skywalker was piloting his [[Azure Angel|Jedi starfighter]] in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] over [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] when he [[Force sense/Legends|sensed]] the presence of Ventress, who flew her [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|own starfighter]], through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Skywalker pursued the [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] to Yavin 4 against the orders of his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and, in response, Kenobi sent a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to provide support for his apprentice. Soon after landing, the squad was [[Death/Legends|wiped out]] by Ventress, who also destroyed Skywalker's starfighter and [[R4-P22|astromech droid]]. The [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] revealed herself to Skywalker and the two engaged in combat. Dueling through the forest, Ventress goaded Skywalker as they approached an ancient [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Temple]], where they continued their fight. After losing his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and confiscating one of his opponent's, Skywalker drew on his hatred of Ventress and attacked her with great force. His blows caused the cliff she stood upon to break and she fell into the ravine below. Seemingly victorious, the Padawan assumed she had died and acquired her ship as a means of getting off the planet. However, Ventress had survived and went on to fight in future Confederate campaigns. ==Prelude== Immediately upon arrival, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] Anakin Skywalker briefly explored his surroundings, and, after the arrival of a [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] of clones that had arrived via a [[CR20 troop carrier/Legends|CR-20 troop carrier]] on the orders of his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], began to seek out his mysterious challenger. Ventress, however, was able to ambush and kill off all of the clone troopers, destroying their [[Transport/Legends|transport]] and Skywalker's [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], the ''[[Azure Angel]]'', along with [[R4-P22]] before revealing herself, approaching the young Jedi as she emerged from within the flaming wreckage and igniting her weapons. ==The duel== As the duel began, however, Skywalker proved that he was able to hold his own against Ventress despite her command of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. As Skywalker was about to strike, Ventress [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force pushed]] him, avoiding the attack. Skywalker returned the favor with another Force Push, Ventress then answered by throwing a tree at him. Skywalker performed ''[[Sun djem/Legends|sun djem]]'' and managed to knock both [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] that Ventress had drawn out of her hands. However, when he went to finish her off, she leaped into the treetops and pulled both swords back to her. Skywalker [[Force speed/Legends|swiftly followed]], but then he lost sight of her. Ventress used the Force to snap the branch Skywalker was on, but as he fell he managed to hang onto a vine, which was then also cut by Ventress. The two duelists leapt through the jungle, going deeper and deeper into the forests of that [[Moon/Legends|moon]] and using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to hurl entire trees at each other as they fought, jumping from tree to tree and cutting vines they swung on. Eventually they landed on a raised walkway and Ventress attempted to use [[Dun Möch/Legends|Dun Möch]] to knock Skywalker from the walkway.{{CW|18}} [[File:Cs_anakinasajj.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Anakin and Ventress dueling.]] Skywalker attacked, forcing Ventress to back off in the face of his assault. Soon he forced her into a [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Temple]]; once inside their battle became even more violent as they made their way to the higher levels. Viciously utilizing [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] against Ventress, Skywalker hurled her backwards; she attempted to retaliate in kind by hurling loose boulders at the Padawan, but he deflected them, Force pushing her against a wall so hard that it shattered. The battle, which had degenerated into an all-out brawl, moved outside onto the rain-slicked ledges and stairways of the temple. Both combatants, their robes tattered and soaked from the rain, paused and regarded each other. [[File:AnakinForceScream-Chapter19.jpg|thumb|300px|Anakin's rage.]] The [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] soon resumed its violent tattoo. Ventress was able to knock Skywalker's lightsaber out of his hand, but before she could capitalize on this opportunity for a killing blow, he responded by catching her by the wrists. Drawing upon his anger, he crushed her left wrist with his mechanical hand, causing her to drop the saber she held much to her own abject shock. Taking up her lightsaber, Skywalker continued to strike at her with vicious slashing attacks and power lunges, driving her back to the edge of the temple peak. He struck harder and harder until the force from the attacks made the stone she was standing on crumble, causing her to fall off of the edge of the temple and into the jungle depths. Skywalker then [[Force scream/Legends|roared in rage]]. As a result of giving into his anger once again, Anakin took yet another step closer to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. ==Aftermath== Assuming that she was dead, Skywalker tossed the lightsaber that he had seized over the precipice; he then commandeered Ventress's [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|Ginivex-class starfighter]] and returned to [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] where, following the battle, Obi-Wan berated him for ignoring orders and running off on his own and expressed his concern about the Sith's interest in Skywalker. In actuality, Ventress survived the fall, and left the planet. She returned to her Confederate allies and continued to fight against the Republic.''[[Star Wars: Republic: Dreadnaughts of Rendili]]'' Some time later, [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] sent [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]] to the moon to acquire [[Piranha beetle/Legends|piranha beetles]] and a [[Great Hyperspace War Bas-Relief|Massassi frieze]].{{InsiderCite|92|Refresher Reading}} Almost [[0 BBY/Legends|22 years later]], when Palpatine's new [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|battle station]] arrived near Yavin 4 to [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destroy]] the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Skywalker, as the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] Darth Vader, would recall the duel with Ventress on this moon.''[[The Rise and Fall of Darth Vader]]'' ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Duel_on_Yavin_4_EGTF.jpg|thumb|500px|The duel was depicted in [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] by [[Chris Trevas]].]] This duel was created for the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars]] television show that aired from [[2003]] to [[2005]]. It appeared in three episodes from the second season, [[Chapter 17 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|17]], [[Chapter 18 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|18]], and [[Chapter 19 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|19]]; all from [[2004]]. In episode [[Chapter 21 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|21]], Obi-Wan Kenobi used this duel as an example of how Skywalker had passed the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trial of Skill]] and was ready to become a Jedi Knight. The duel was depicted in [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] by [[Chris Trevas]] This duel was recounted as #4 on the list of the ''[[20 Most Memorable Moments of the Expanded Universe]]'' in [[Star Wars Insider 83|''Star Wars Insider'' 83]]. It was billed as the meeting of the "Heirs of the Sith." ==Appearances== *{{CW|17}} {{1st}} *{{CW|18}} *{{CW|19}} *{{CW|21}} {{Mo}} *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Lightsaber Duels]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The Rise and Fall of Darth Vader]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|83|20 Most Memorable Moments of the Expanded Universe}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *{{InsiderCite|92|Refresher Reading}} *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 12|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 12]] *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Duelo en Yavin 4 |fr=Duel sur Yavin 4 |it=Duello su Yavin IV |esGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yavin 4, duel on}} [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]] [[Category:Battles of Yavin 4]] [[Category:Duels]]
